title: lens disperma
intro: Lens disperma, also known as Indian gentian, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lens disperma include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Lens disperma can be found in the form of capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to treat digestive disorders and other health conditions.
